category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Sri Lanka) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Sri Lanka Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入斯里兰卡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入斯里蘭卡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Sri Lanka requirements: SLSI conformity and the SLS mark, SLS/IEC 62133 cell safety, EMC and electrical safety, UN 38.3 transport, TRCSL radio approval for wireless features, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与斯里兰卡要求对照：SLSI合格评定及SLS标志、SLS/IEC 62133电芯安全、电磁兼容与电气安全、UN 38.3运输、无线功能的TRCSL无线电核准，以及当地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與斯里蘭卡要求對照：SLSI合格評定及SLS標誌、SLS/IEC 62133電芯安全、電磁兼容與電氣安全、UN 38.3運輸、無線功能的TRCSL無線電核准，以及當地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment result, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters targeting Sri Lanka should plan for SLSI conformity and the SLS mark where the product is within a regulated scope, cell-safety testing aligned with SLS/IEC 62133, electrical-safety and EMC evidence, UN 38.3 transport documentation, TRCSL radio approval if the device has wireless features, and an in-country importer to handle clearance through the Port of Colombo — none of which is automatically satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Sri Lanka has no EU-style horizontal battery, RoHS, or producer-responsibility regime.
answer_first.zh: 面向斯里兰卡的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，应在产品属于受监管范围时规划SLSI合格评定及SLS标志，准备与SLS/IEC 62133一致的电芯安全测试、电气安全及电磁兼容证据、UN 38.3运输文件；若设备含无线功能还需TRCSL无线电核准，并通过当地进口商办理科伦坡港清关——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证自动替代。斯里兰卡没有欧盟式的横向电池、RoHS或生产者责任制度。
answer_first.zht: 面向斯里蘭卡的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，應在產品屬於受監管範圍時規劃SLSI合格評定及SLS標誌，準備與SLS/IEC 62133一致的電芯安全測試、電氣安全及電磁兼容證據、UN 38.3運輸文件；若設備含無線功能還需TRCSL無線電核准，並透過當地進口商辦理科倫坡港清關——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證自動替代。斯里蘭卡沒有歐盟式的橫向電池、RoHS或生產者責任制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (SLSI, TRCSL, SLSEA, IEC, UNECE) preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
